operator_goal: Create a docs-only AI_OS planner packet for a safe local documentation task.

task_context.visible_success_condition: A fixture-only planner preview can classify a goal and produce an inert packet draft without live API calls or protected writes.

stop_point: Stop after producing fixture-only planner preview output. Do not call APIs, install packages, commit, push, or mutate runtime state.
recommended_next_action: Review the fixture output and, if accepted, create a separate DRY_RUN packet for a non-executable local preview adapter.
